form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Comes here off a 38-day let-up. Most recently tried to lead throughout but was claimed late 2nd of 12 at this track on March 3 over 900m, 0.5 len behind Pod Duke with 52kg at $7.90. The run before that scored a big 4 len win at this track February 3 over 900m defeating Dynamite Bull carrying 52kg at $1.30. Well placed to take this out.
